requirement_topic.en: 60 Hz Electrical Design and Grid Settings

summary.en: Colombia BESS export configurations should be validated for the local 60 Hz electricity system and for the frequency, voltage, protection, metering, and communications settings required by the interconnection route. PCS, transformers, relays, HVAC, auxiliary power supplies, pumps, fire equipment, meters, and controls should be checked against the actual Colombian project grid conditions before shipment and commissioning.
summary.zh: 出口哥伦比亚的BESS配置应针对当地60Hz电力系统以及并网路径要求的频率、电压、保护、计量和通信设置进行验证。PCS、变压器、继电器、HVAC、辅助电源、泵、消防设备、计量表和控制系统应在出货及调试前按照哥伦比亚项目实际电网条件核查。
summary.zht: 出口哥倫比亞的BESS配置應針對當地60Hz電力系統以及併網路徑要求的頻率、電壓、保護、計量和通信設置進行驗證。PCS、變壓器、繼電器、HVAC、輔助電源、泵、消防設備、計量表和控制系統應在出貨及調試前按照哥倫比亞項目實際電網條件核查。

standards_or_laws: RETIE electrical installation evidence where applicable

summary.en: China domestic grid-storage equipment and factory files are commonly prepared around 50 Hz assumptions. China GB/T storage documentation can support system design, but the export configuration should separately prove 60 Hz ratings, control settings, protection behavior, and auxiliary-load compatibility.
summary.zh: 中国国内电网侧储能设备和工厂文件通常基于50Hz假设准备。中国GB/T储能文件可支持系统设计，但出口配置应单独证明60Hz额定值、控制设置、保护行为和辅助负载兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國國內電網側儲能設備和工廠文件通常基於50Hz假設準備。中國GB/T儲能文件可支持系統設計，但出口配置應單獨證明60Hz額定值、控制設置、保護行為和輔助負載相容性。

gap.en: Identify every 50 Hz-only component or setting in the China design file. Provide 60 Hz nameplate evidence, PCS type-test settings, relay settings, transformer and auxiliary-load ratings, and updated FAT / SAT procedures for Colombia.
gap.zh: 应识别中国设计文件中所有仅适用于50Hz的部件或设置。应提供60Hz铭牌证据、PCS型式试验设置、继电保护定值、变压器和辅助负载额定值，以及面向哥伦比亚更新的FAT/SAT程序。
gap.zht: 應識別中國設計文件中所有僅適用於50Hz的部件或設置。應提供60Hz銘牌證據、PCS型式試驗設置、繼電保護定值、變壓器和輔助負載額定值，以及面向哥倫比亞更新的FAT/SAT程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as an engineering and interconnection requirement where Colombia 60 Hz grid connection, equipment safety, or commissioning requirements apply
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic evidence may be 50 Hz-based unless the export configuration is specifically tested and rated for 60 Hz

source.publisher: Unidad de Planeacion Minero Energetica (UPME), Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia export configurations should be proven at 60 Hz. A China 50 Hz grid-storage file is not enough unless the actual PCS and balance-of-system configuration is rated, tested, and set for Colombia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口哥伦比亚的配置应证明适用于60Hz。除非实际PCS和辅助系统配置已按哥伦比亚完成额定、测试和设置，否则中国50Hz电网侧储能文件并不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口哥倫比亞的配置應證明適用於60Hz。除非實際PCS和輔助系統配置已按哥倫比亞完成額定、測試和設置，否則中國50Hz電網側儲能文件並不足夠。
